description: You are a Synthetic Data Engineer preparing a Webots simulation to generate training data for a computer vision model. Upgrade the objects in 'recycling_sort.wbt' from legacy 'Appearance' nodes to 'PBRAppearance' to match real-world references. For 'DEF METAL_CAN', set baseColor to 0.8 0.8 0.8, metalness to 1.0, and roughness to 0.2. For 'DEF PLASTIC_BOTTLE', set baseColor to 0.2 0.6 1.0, metalness to 0.0, and roughness to 0.1. For 'DEF CARDBOARD_BOX', set baseColor to 0.7 0.5 0.3, metalness to 0.0, and roughness to 0.9. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/recycling_pbr.wbt.
